title: cardamine californica var. integrifolia
intro: Cardamine californica var. integrifolia, also known as California bittercress or coast range bittercress, is a plant species in the mustard family (Brassicaceae) that is native to the western coast of North America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial compounds, and has been employed to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cardamine californica var. integrifolia include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and promote tissue repair, making it a valuable herb for wound care and skin health. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
